figures.caption: Figure 5: Final 𝓁2-error under pseudo-Huber loss versus number of machines 𝑚 (log-log scale). Columns correspond to attack types, fixing (𝑛, 𝑑) = (400, 500) and 𝛼 = 0.2.

Figure 4: Final 𝓁2-error under pseudo-Huber loss versus sample size 𝑛 (log-log scale). Columns correspond to dimensions 𝑑 ∈ {100, 500, 1000}, with fixed 𝑚 = 50 and sign flip attack of the ratio 𝛼 = 0.2.
